paper_title: Analysis of Rainfall Dynamics in the Atacama Desert

methods.description: Process for quantifying atmospheric moisture fluxes using WRF simulations by computing the integrated water vapour flux (IWVF), which includes zonal and meridional components.

methods.description: Classification of moisture conveyor belts (MCBs) using machine learning techniques applied to IWVF data over the offshore region of western central South America.

methods.description: Automated identification of mid-tropospheric troughs off the Atacama coast using a detection algorithm based on geopotential height gradients.

methods.method_name: Model Simulations with CESM2 and WRF
methods.description: Simulation of climate conditions using CESM2 and WRF models to analyze rainfall dynamics in the Atacama Desert during the mid-Pliocene and present-day.
